blocks.content:
Congratulations on completing this journey! Job well done!

We hope you've enjoyed traveling with us as you:

- Learned about the value of monitoring HAProxy load balancers
- Installed Grafana Alloy and configured HAProxy to expose its stats endpoint
- Set up the HAProxy integration in Grafana Cloud
- Verified that metrics are flowing and explored prebuilt dashboards for connection and latency monitoring

---

### More to explore (optional)

The world is your oyster! Read more about how you can:

- [Monitor alerts](https://grafana.com/docs/grafana-cloud/alerting-and-irm/alerting/monitor-status)
- [Get started with incident response](https://grafana.com/docs/grafana-cloud/alerting-and-irm/irm/incident/get-started)
- [Scale your deployment](https://grafana.com/docs/grafana-cloud/send-data/fleet-management)

---

### Related paths

Consider taking the following paths after you complete this journey:

- [Explore data using Metrics Drilldown](https://grafana.com/docs/learning-paths/drilldown-metrics/)
- [Explore logs using Logs Drilldown](https://grafana.com/docs/learning-paths/drilldown-logs/)
- [Set up infrastructure alerting](https://grafana.com/docs/learning-paths/infrastructure-alerting/)
